policy_text: Students must maintain at least 75% attendance to be eligible for exams.
Attendance below 50% will lead to course failure.
Final grade is based on assignments (40%) and exams (60%).
Students must score at least 40% to pass the course.
Students are allowed to use AI tools for learning but not during exams.
AI-generated content must be properly cited.
Plagiarism is strictly prohibited and will result in disciplinary action.
